zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Arderne於1348年出生在英國林可爾史爾阿福德時，她的父親John de Arderne50歲，母親Ellen Wasteneys22歲。她去世於1381年9月30日在她的家鄉享年33歲。

zh-hans.Alford, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾阿福德

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Arderne于1348年出生在英国林可爾史爾阿福德时，她的父亲John de Arderne50岁，母亲Ellen Wasteneys22岁。她去世于1381年9月30日在她的家乡享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Arderne was born in 1348, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John de Arderne, was 50 and her mother, Ellen Wasteneys, was 22. She died on 30 September 1381, in her hometown, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Arderne est née en 1348, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Arderne, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Ellen Wasteneys, avait 22 ans. Elle est décédée le 30 septembre 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Arderne 1348 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Arderne 50 und ihre Mutter Ellen Wasteneys 22. Sie starb am 30. September 1381 im Alter von 33 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Arderne è nata il nel 1348 nel Alford, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John de Arderne, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Ellen Wasteneys, aveva 22 anni. Morì il 30 settembre 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Arderneが1348年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードで生まれた時，父John de Arderneは50歳，母Ellen Wasteneysは22歳であった。彼女は1381年9月30日に故郷で33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Arderne(이)가 1348년 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Arderne(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Wasteneys(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1381년 9월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aldford, Cheshire, England: Aldford, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Arderne nasceu em 1348, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Arderne, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Wasteneys, tinha 22 anos. Ela faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Arderne родилась в 1348 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Arderne было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Wasteneys, 22. Она умерла 30 сентября 1381 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Arderne nació en 1348, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Arderne, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Ellen Wasteneys, tenía 22 años. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años.
